name: mysmb-marketplace
description: Curated agent plugins for SMB-focused business integrations - Xero, QuickBooks, Stripe, HubSpot, and more.

plugins.name: deskcrm
plugins.description: Lightweight SMB CRM backed by an Excel workbook. Stores contacts and accounts in Contacts and Accounts sheets and exposes CRUD operations over a stdio MCP server. Primarily used for testing the marketplace and plugin lifecycle.

plugins.name: microsoft-365
plugins.description: Access Microsoft 365 emails, calendar, files, Teams, and people via Microsoft Graph. Six MCP servers with independent OAuth scopes — mail is split into read (user-consentable) and send (admin-consent).

plugins.name: xero-accounting
plugins.description: Full Xero Accounting API coverage via the myHub-hosted OAuth MCP gateway. 119 tools covering sales, purchases, banking, attachments, history, linked transactions, expense claims, receipts, payment services, and all 8 financial reports. Browser OAuth, no API keys.

plugins.name: xero-projects
plugins.description: Xero Projects via the myHub-hosted OAuth MCP gateway. Projects, tasks, time entries, project users. 11 tools.

plugins.name: xero-assets
plugins.description: Xero Fixed Assets register via the myHub-hosted OAuth MCP gateway. List, view, and register fixed assets. 5 tools.

plugins.name: xero-finance
plugins.description: Read-only Xero Finance API — cash validation, AR/AP statements, account usage, bank statement reconciliation. Higher-fidelity than Accounting reports. 6 tools.

plugins.name: xero-payroll-au
plugins.description: Xero Payroll AU — employees, pay runs, leave, timesheets, superannuation. AU organisations only. 24 tools.
